testcase.name: blankMobileTest

failure.message: Expected blank mobile number toast. expected [Please enter Mobile no.] but found [null]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Expected blank mobile number toast. expected [Please enter Mobile no.] but found [null] at Eazy_Retail.login.blankMobileTest(login.java:101) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ... Removed 32 stack frames
